description: A short, beginner-friendly explainer course on Tavily. It starts with what the technology is, why it exists, and the problem it solves, then moves from mental models to practical usage and implementation. Each lesson builds on the last in plain language.

lessons.title: Search Depth: Matching Effort to the Question
Map: Discovering Site Structure Before You Crawl
Query Routing: Matching the Question to the Right Tool
Searching Your Own Data and the Web Together
